eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a registered construction worker under the Karnataka Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. The accident should have resulted in death, permanent total disability, or permanent partial disability.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Registration Certificate, Medical Certificate, Disability Certificate (if applicable), Death Certificate (if applicable), FIR Copy, Postmortem Report (if applicable), Self Declaration.
application_process: Log in to the Karnataka Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board portal, select the scheme, upload the required documents, and submit the application online.
benefits: Rs.5,00,000 in case of accidental death, Rs.2,00,000 for permanent total disability, and Rs.1,00,000 for permanent partial disability.

implementing_agency: Bihar State Minorities Financial Corporation Limited
tags: Employment, Loan, Minority, Self Employment, Entrepreneurship
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking Financial Services and Insurance
brief_description: The scheme provides concessional loans to eligible minority youth for self-employment and income-generating activities.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a permanent resident of Bihar, belong to a notified minority community, be between 18 and 50 years of age, and have an annual family income below Rs.4 lakh.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photograph, Age Proof, Educational or Skill Certificates, Bank Account Details, Minority Community Certificate, Income Certificate, Residence Certificate, Disability Certificate (if applicable).
application_process: Submit the application with required documents to the District Minority Welfare Office. Applications are verified, inspected, and processed before loan sanction and disbursement.
benefits: Loan of up to Rs.5,00,000 at a simple interest rate of 5% for self-employment and income-generating activities.

implementing_agency: Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
tags: Agriculture, Certified Seeds, Farmer, Seed Production, Subsidy
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for the production of certified pulse seeds.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a farmer engaged in the production of certified pulse seeds in Tamil Nadu.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Voter ID or Identity Proof, Land Ownership or Lease Documents, Seed Production Certification, Bank Account Details, Caste Certificate (if applicable), Women Farmer Group Registration Documents (if applicable).
application_process: Obtain the application form from the nearest Agriculture Department office, complete the form, attach the required documents, and submit it to the concerned Agricultural Officer.
benefits: Subsidy of Rs.1,000 per quintal for the production of certified pulse seeds.

implementing_agency: Panchayati Raj and Drinking Water Department, Government of Odisha
tags: Housing, Rural Housing, Pucca House, Odisha
brief_description: The scheme aims to provide pucca houses to eligible rural households living in kutcha houses in Odisha.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a permanent resident of Odisha, belong to an economically weaker household, and reside in a kutcha house. The applicant should not own a pucca house or have received housing assistance under similar rural housing schemes.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Certificate, Voter ID, Income Certificate, BPL/EWS Certificate, Age Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply through the Rural Housing Odisha portal or through the concerned Block Development Office. Eligible beneficiaries are selected and approved by the competent authorities.
benefits: Financial assistance for construction of pucca houses. Under the special component, assistance of Rs.1,20,000 in non-IAP districts and Rs.1,30,000 in IAP districts is provided. Additional incentives are available for early completion of houses.

implementing_agency: Panchayati Raj and Drinking Water Department, Government of Odisha
tags: Housing, Pucca House, Mining Areas, Rural Housing
brief_description: The scheme provides pucca houses to eligible households residing in mining-affected blocks of Odisha.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should belong to a kutcha household residing in a notified mining-affected block of Odisha and should not have received housing assistance under any other rural housing scheme.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photograph, Ration Card, Residence Certificate, Income Certificate, Age Proof, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Apply through the Rural Housing Odisha portal or through the concerned Block Development Office. Beneficiaries are identified through surveys and approved by local authorities.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.1,20,000 for non-IAP districts and Rs.1,30,000 for IAP districts for construction of a pucca house. Additional benefits include MGNREGS wage support, toilet construction assistance, and incentives for early completion.

implementing_agency: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Tamil Nadu
tags: Generator, MSME, Manufacturing, Subsidy
brief_description: The scheme provides subsidy support for the purchase and installation of generator sets by manufacturing MSMEs.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a new or existing Micro, Small, or Medium Manufacturing Enterprise in Tamil Nadu. The generator set should not exceed 125 KVA capacity, and the subsidy claim should be submitted within six months of purchase or installation.
documents_required: Generator Purchase Invoice, Installation Certificate, MSME Registration Certificate, Bank Account Details, Proof of Purchase and Installation.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the concerned Regional Joint Director of Industries and Commerce.
benefits: Subsidy of 25% of the cost of the generator set, subject to a maximum of Rs.1,50,000 for generator sets up to 125 KVA capacity.

implementing_agency: Andhra Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
tags: Construction Worker, Temporary Disability, Hospitalization, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered construction workers who suffer temporary disability due to accidents or illness requiring hospitalization.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a registered construction worker under the Andhra Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board and should have suffered temporary disability due to an accident or disease.
documents_required: Construction Worker Registration Card, Medical Certificate, Hospitalization Records, Aadhaar Card, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Assistant Labour Officer or Assistant Commissioner of Labour.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.3,000 per month during the period of temporary disability and hospitalization, subject to scheme conditions.

implementing_agency: Mizoram Scholarship Board, Government of Mizoram
tags: Merit Scholarship, Post Matric, Student, Higher Education
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to meritorious students who are permanent residents of Mizoram and pursuing post-matric education.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a permanent resident of Mizoram studying in a recognized post-matric institution in India and should have secured at least 60% marks or first division in the previous Board or University examination. The applicant should not be receiving another scholarship of higher value.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Bank Account Details, Previous Examination Marksheet, Permanent Residential Certificate, Caste Certificate (if applicable), Other Supporting Documents as required.
application_process: Apply through the Mizoram Scholarship Board portal or submit the prescribed application form through the concerned educational institution along with the required documents.
benefits: Financial assistance in the form of a merit scholarship to eligible post-matric students.

implementing_agency: Mission Youth, Government of Jammu and Kashmir
tags: Entrepreneurship, Startup, Employment Generation, Youth, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme promotes community-oriented entrepreneurship by providing financial and strategic support to youth groups for establishing sustainable livelihood enterprises.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant group should consist of at least three unemployed youth domiciled in Jammu and Kashmir, aged between 18 and 35 years, with minimum educational qualification of 12th standard. Group members should not have availed benefits under similar self-employment schemes and should not be bank defaulters.
documents_required: Domicile Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Date of Birth Proof, Educational Qualification Certificate, Unemployment Certificate (if applicable), Project Report, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Interested youth groups should apply through the Mission Youth portal, submit the required details and project report, and undergo evaluation and training before financial assistance is sanctioned.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs.20 lakh consisting of subsidy support from Mission Youth and bank-linked credit for eligible community entrepreneurship projects.

scheme_name: Pre Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
implementing_agency: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (DEPwD)
tags: Disability, Scholarship, Pre-Matric, Education, Student
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to students with disabilities studying in Classes 9 and 10 to support their education.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be studying in Class 9 or 10, possess a disability of 40% or more, and have parental annual income not exceeding Rs.2 lakh. The applicant should not be receiving any other government scholarship.
documents_required: Disability Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Income Certificate, Previous Academic Record, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph, Institution Verification Certificate.
application_process: Apply online through the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) and submit the required documents for verification.
benefits: Scholarship assistance for educational expenses including maintenance allowance and other admissible benefits as per scheme guidelines.

scheme_name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Railway Protection Force
implementing_agency: Ministry of Railways
tags: RPF, RPSF, Scholarship, Higher Education, Student
brief_description: The scheme encourages higher professional and technical education among dependent wards and widows of serving or retired RPF/RPSF personnel.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a dependent ward or widow of serving or retired RPF/RPSF personnel below gazetted officer rank, admitted to a recognized professional or technical course, and have secured at least 60% marks in the minimum qualifying examination.
documents_required: Service Certificate or Discharge Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Previous Qualification Marksheet, Bank Account Details, Admission Proof, Institution Verification Documents.
application_process: Apply online through the National Scholarship Portal by selecting the Ministry of Railways scholarship scheme and uploading the required documents.
benefits: Scholarship of Rs.2,500 per month for male students and Rs.3,000 per month for female students for the duration of the approved course.

implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture, Government of Arunachal Pradesh
tags: Agriculture, Farmer, Self-Reliance, Farm Mechanization, Sustainability
brief_description: The scheme promotes self-reliance in agriculture by providing financial assistance and institutional support for modern farming activities and infrastructure development.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a resident farmer of Arunachal Pradesh engaged in agriculture or allied activities and meeting the eligibility conditions prescribed by the implementing department and participating financial institution.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Certificate, Land Ownership or Cultivation Proof, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph, Project Proposal (if applicable).
application_process: Eligible farmers may apply through the Department of Agriculture or participating financial institutions with the required documents and project details.
benefits: Financial assistance and access to collateral-free loans of up to Rs.1.60 lakh for approved agricultural activities including farm mechanization, scientific cultivation, horticulture, and allied sectors.

implementing_agency: Karnataka Forest Department
tags: Afforestation, Farmer, Tree Plantation, Subsidy, Agroforestry
brief_description: The scheme encourages farmers to increase tree cover on private lands by providing subsidized seedlings and monetary incentives for nurturing planted trees.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a farmer possessing land records (Pahani) for the land where plantation is proposed. Registration should be completed before the onset of the rainy season. Certain species such as Eucalyptus, Acacia, Casuarina, Coconut, Arecanut, and selected commercial species are not eligible for incentives.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photograph, Pahani/Land Records, Land Sketch, Details of Seedlings Proposed for Plantation, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Apply through the Karnataka Forest Department before the planting season by submitting the required documents and plantation details.
benefits: Subsidized seedlings and incentives of Rs.35 per surviving seedling after the first year, Rs.40 after the second year, and Rs.50 after the third year, totaling Rs.125 per surviving seedling.

scheme_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Awas Navinikaran Yojana
implementing_agency: Welfare of Scheduled Castes and Backward Classes Department, Government of Haryana
tags: Housing, House Repair, Scheduled Caste, BPL, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to economically weaker Scheduled Caste families for the repair and renovation of their houses.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste community, be a permanent resident of Haryana, be listed under the Below Poverty Line category, possess the required residential plot, and own a house requiring repairs.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Ration Card, Voter ID, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Land Ownership Certificate, House Repair Estimate, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Apply online through the SARAL Haryana portal or submit the prescribed application form to the concerned Welfare Department office along with the required documents.
benefits: Financial assistance of up to Rs.80,000 for house repair and renovation.

implementing_agency: Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC)
tags: Entrepreneurship, Employment, Loan, Subsidy, MSME, Self Employment
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Banking Financial Services and Insurance, Skills & Employment
brief_description: PMEGP is a credit-linked subsidy scheme that supports the establishment of new micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas to generate self-employment opportunities.
eligibility_criteria: Any individual above 18 years of age is eligible. For manufacturing projects above Rs.10 lakh and service projects above Rs.5 lakh, the applicant should have passed at least Class VIII. Existing units that have already availed government subsidy under other schemes are not eligible.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Project Report, Educational Qualification Certificate (where applicable), Bank Account Details, Category Certificate (if applicable), Address Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the PMEGP e-portal, submit the application with required documents, and complete verification through the implementing agency and bank.
benefits: Credit-linked subsidy ranging from 15% to 35% of project cost depending on category and location. Maximum project cost eligible is Rs.50 lakh for manufacturing and Rs.20 lakh for service enterprises.

scheme_name: Karkhandar Scheme for Development of Craft Sector
implementing_agency: Directorate of Handicrafts and Handloom, Government of Jammu and Kashmir
tags: Skill Development, Handicrafts, Handloom, Training, Employment
brief_description: The scheme provides advanced skill upgradation training to meritorious trainees and ex-trainees in traditional and endangered crafts through registered craft units.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a pass-out trainee or ex-trainee from a departmental training center operated by the Handicrafts and Handloom Department and possess an Aadhaar-linked bank account.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Bank Account Details, Training Completion Certificate, Identity Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Eligible candidates are selected through departmental training centers and enrolled in approved Karkhandars or craft units for skill upgradation training.
benefits: Advanced skill development training, exposure to traditional crafts, entrepreneurship support, and improved livelihood opportunities.

scheme_name: The Artist Welfare Fund of Assam
implementing_agency: Assam State Film (Finance and Development) Corporation, Department of Cultural Affairs, Government of Assam
tags: Artist Welfare, Medical Aid, Education Assistance, Financial Assistance, Culture
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance, medical aid, educational support, and welfare benefits to artists and their dependent family members facing financial hardship.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be an artist associated with the field of art and culture in Assam, be at least 20 years old, face financial hardship, and possess recognized artistic achievements supported by relevant credentials.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Identity Proof, Artistic Achievement Certificates, Income Proof, Medical Documents (if applicable), Educational Documents (if applicable), Passport-size Photograph, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Assam State Film (Finance and Development) Corporation for consideration under the fund.
benefits: Financial assistance for artists in distress, medical aid, educational support for up to two children, and assistance during emergencies, accidents, or old age.

implementing_agency: Department of Rural Development, Government of Andhra Pradesh
tags: Agriculture, Irrigation, Borewell, Farmer, Groundwater
brief_description: The scheme provides free borewell drilling to eligible farmers for improving irrigation facilities and optimal utilization of groundwater resources.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a resident farmer of Andhra Pradesh and should not have an existing functional borewell or should have a failed borewell on the agricultural land.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Land Ownership Documents, Farmer Identity Proof, Bank Account Details, Residence Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply through the YSR Jala Kala portal or the concerned Rural Development Department office. Eligible applications are verified and borewell drilling is undertaken after hydrogeological and geophysical surveys.
benefits: Free borewell drilling and groundwater assessment services for eligible farmers.

implementing_agency: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI)
tags: Scholarship, Agriculture Education, M.Sc, Ph.D, Research
brief_description: The scholarship supports eligible M.Sc. and Ph.D. students pursuing higher education and research at the Indian Agricultural Research Institute.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be admitted to an eligible M.Sc. or Ph.D. program at IARI and satisfy the academic qualifications prescribed by the institute. Applicants must maintain the required academic performance during the course.
documents_required: Date of Birth Proof, Class 10 Certificate and Marksheet, Class 12 Certificate and Marksheet, Bachelor's Degree Certificate and Marksheet, Master's Degree Certificate and Marksheet (for Ph.D.), Caste Certificate (if applicable), Passport-size Photographs.
application_process: Apply for admission to the relevant postgraduate program at IARI and submit the scholarship application along with the required documents as prescribed by the institute.
benefits: Scholarship of Rs.7,560 per month for M.Sc. students and Rs.10,500 per month for Ph.D. students, along with annual contingency grants for academic and research expenses.

scheme_name: RMEWF - Financial Assistance for Ex-Servicemen in Penury
implementing_agency: Kendriya Sainik Board
tags: Ex-Servicemen, Widow, Penury, Financial Assistance, Welfare
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to non-pensioner ex-servicemen and their widows who are living in extreme financial hardship.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a non-pensioner ex-serviceman up to the rank of Havildar or equivalent, or the widow of such an ex-serviceman. The applicant should be facing extreme financial hardship and generally be 65 years of age or above, subject to scheme provisions.
documents_required: Discharge Certificate, Identity Proof, Age Proof, Income Certificate, Bank Account Details, Widow Certificate (if applicable), Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply through the concerned Zila Sainik Welfare Office or Rajya Sainik Board with the prescribed application and supporting documents.
benefits: Financial assistance to eligible non-pensioner ex-servicemen and widows living in penury.

implementing_agency: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Jammu and Kashmir
tags: Social Security, Pension, Insurance, Marginal Workers, Welfare
category: Banking Financial Services and Insurance, Social Welfare & Empowerment
brief_description: The scheme provides social security and insurance coverage to marginal workers through a contributory savings model supported by the government.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a domicile of Jammu and Kashmir, at least 18 years old, engaged as a marginal worker, and have an annual income not exceeding Rs.48,000. The applicant or spouse should not be receiving benefits under a similar scheme.
documents_required: Residence Proof, Identity Proof, Age Proof, Income and Occupation Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photographs, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Obtain the application form from the Tehsil Social Welfare Office, District Social Welfare Office, or designated bank. Submit the completed application with required documents to the District Social Welfare Officer.
benefits: Government contribution of Rs.300 and beneficiary contribution of Rs.200 per quarter into a social security account for 5 or 10 years, along with insurance coverage and pension-related benefits.

scheme_name: State Programme for Rehabilitation of Persons with Disabilities
implementing_agency: State Disability Rehabilitation Centre, Directorate of Social Justice and Empowerment and Tribal Affairs, Government of Arunachal Pradesh
tags: Disability, Rehabilitation, Assistive Devices, Welfare, Healthcare
brief_description: The scheme provides rehabilitation services, assistive devices, physiotherapy support, and welfare assistance to persons with disabilities in Arunachal Pradesh.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh and possess a valid disability certificate. Priority may be given to persons with severe disabilities as per scheme guidelines.
documents_required: Disability Certificate, Doctor's Prescription, Identity Proof, Passport-size Photographs, Mobile Number, Application Form or Request Letter.
application_process: Apply through the State Disability Rehabilitation Centre or the Directorate of Social Justice and Empowerment and Tribal Affairs by submitting the prescribed application and required documents.
benefits: Free distribution of assistive devices such as wheelchairs, tricycles, crutches, hearing aids, walking sticks, and access to physiotherapy and rehabilitation services.

implementing_agency: Jharkhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (JBOCWWB)
target_beneficiaries: Registered Construction Workers and Their Families
tags: Marriage Assistance, Construction Worker, Financial Assistance, Social Welfare
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered construction workers for the marriage of their children or female family members.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a domicile of Jharkhand and a registered construction worker with the Jharkhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. The worker should have contributed continuously for at least 5 years. The bride must be at least 18 years old and the groom must be at least 21 years old. Benefits are available for up to two children or female family members.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Jharkhand Domicile Certificate, JBOCWWB Registration Card, Proof of Contribution, Marriage Invitation Card, Age Proof of Bride and Groom, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the Shramadhan Portal and upload the required documents for verification and approval.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.30,000 for the marriage of up to two children or eligible female family members.

implementing_agency: Industries and Commerce Department, Government of Assam
tags: MSME, Marketing Support, Trade Fair, Entrepreneurship, Business Development
brief_description: The scheme supports Micro and Small Enterprises by assisting their participation in trade fairs, exhibitions, and marketing events within India and abroad.
eligibility_criteria: The enterprise should be located in Assam, operating for at least 2 years, possess its own production facility or workshed, and the applicant should be between 18 and 50 years of age.
documents_required: Identity Proof, MSME Registration Certificate, Business Registration Documents, Proof of Business Operations, Trade Fair Participation Details, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application to the Industries and Commerce Department along with supporting documents for approval.
benefits: Financial assistance for participation in trade fairs, exhibitions, and marketing events to promote products and expand market access.

scheme_name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana
implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture and Cooperation, Government of Gujarat
tags: Women Farmers, Agriculture, Empowerment, Training, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme aims to empower women farmers by providing financial assistance, training, access to credit, and support for agricultural activities.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a woman farmer residing in Gujarat who owns or cultivates agricultural land. Individual women farmers and women farmer groups are eligible to apply.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Proof, Land Ownership or Cultivation Proof, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph, Registration with Agriculture Department (if applicable).
application_process: Register with the Department of Agriculture and Cooperation and submit the prescribed application along with required documents through the designated agriculture office.
benefits: Financial assistance for agricultural activities, capacity-building training, support for women farmer groups, access to institutional credit, and market linkage support.

scheme_name: Scholarship to Pre-Service Student Teachers Undergoing D.El.Ed Programme at DIETs and Sohra
implementing_agency: Directorate of Educational Research and Training, Government of Meghalaya
tags: Scholarship, D.El.Ed, Teacher Education, Student, Teaching
brief_description: The scheme provides scholarships to meritorious students pursuing the 2-year D.El.Ed programme at DIETs and Sohra to encourage talented youth to join the teaching profession.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya, have passed Class 10 or equivalent with at least 50% marks (5% relaxation for reserved categories), and be between 18 and 27 years of age. Admission is based on merit and entrance examination.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Birth Certificate, Class 10 Marksheet and Certificate, Domicile Certificate, Caste Certificate (if applicable), Passport-size Photograph, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal (NSP), complete registration, submit the scholarship application, and participate in the entrance test and counseling process.
benefits: Scholarship of Rs.5,000 per month for 10 months per year for 2 years.

implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Natural Farming, Organic Farming, Farmer, Training, Agriculture
brief_description: The scheme promotes natural farming practices using locally available resources and indigenous cow-based inputs to reduce cultivation costs and improve sustainability.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a farmer with at least one acre of agricultural land or be a family account holder. Preference is given to SC, ST, BPL, small and marginal farmers, and youth farmers. Farmers already covered under Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana are not eligible.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Bank Passbook, Land Ownership Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply through the Agriculture Department office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra, submit the application form with required documents, and participate in training programmes.
benefits: 50% subsidy on eligible natural farming inputs and equipment, support for input preparation units, training programmes, farmer exposure visits, and Gram Panchayat-level capacity building.

scheme_name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region - Supply of Baby Pulpers
implementing_agency: Coffee Board
tags: Coffee, Farmer, Subsidy, Quality Improvement, Agriculture
brief_description: The scheme supports coffee growers in improving coffee quality through the supply of baby pulpers for post-harvest processing.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a registered coffee grower in the North Eastern Region and possess land records in their name for the coffee holding.
documents_required: Coffee Grower Registration Certificate, Land Records or Possession Certificate, Identity Proof, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application through the Coffee Board along with the required documents and beneficiary contribution. The Coffee Board procures and supplies the baby pulpers after approval.
benefits: Subsidy of 75% of the unit cost, subject to a maximum unit cost of Rs.16,000.

scheme_name: Internship Scheme for PG and Research Students in Directorate General of Trade Remedies (DGTR)
implementing_agency: Directorate General of Trade Remedies (DGTR)
tags: Internship, Research, Trade, Economics, Law
brief_description: The internship provides postgraduate students and research scholars with exposure to trade remedy investigations and trade defence measures.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a postgraduate student or research scholar from a recognized university or institution. The internship should be part of the academic curriculum or undertaken during academic vacations.
documents_required: Application Form, Forwarding Letter from Supervisor or Head of Department, Identity Proof, Academic Documents, Curriculum Vitae (if applicable).
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Directorate General of Trade Remedies at least one month before the intended internship start date.
benefits: Internship completion certificate upon successful completion. No stipend or financial assistance is provided.

scheme_name: Scheme for Margin Money Grant to Nano Units
implementing_agency: Directorate of Industries and Commerce, Government of Kerala
tags: Entrepreneurship, Nano Unit, MSME, Margin Money, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme provides margin money assistance to new nano enterprises engaged in manufacturing, food processing, job work, and service activities.
eligibility_criteria: New nano enterprises with project cost up to Rs.10 lakh engaged in manufacturing, food processing, job work, or service activities are eligible. The unit should not have received similar government assistance earlier.
documents_required: Project Report, Land Ownership or Lease Documents, Building Ownership Certificate, Machinery Quotations or Invoices, Bank Loan Sanction Letter (if applicable), Civil Construction Valuation Certificate.
application_process: Apply online through the Directorate of Industries and Commerce portal, complete registration, upload the required documents, and submit the application for approval.
benefits: Margin money grant of 30% of project cost (up to Rs.3 lakh) for general category applicants and 40% of project cost (up to Rs.4 lakh) for eligible special category applicants.

scheme_name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Memorial Award to Scheduled Caste Students
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
tags: Scholarship, Award, Scheduled Caste, Education, Student
brief_description: The award is granted to top-ranking Scheduled Caste boy and girl students who secure at least 55% marks in the Higher Secondary Examination.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste community, be a resident of Puducherry for at least 5 years, and have secured a minimum of 55% marks in the Higher Secondary Examination.
documents_required: Residence and Nativity Certificate, Caste Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Income Certificate, Bank Passbook, Passport-size Photograph, Higher Secondary Marksheet and Certificates.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department office.
benefits: Cash award of Rs.15,000 to eligible top-ranking Scheduled Caste students.

scheme_name: Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant and Lactating Women
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
target_beneficiaries: Scheduled Caste Pregnant and Lactating Women
tags: Pregnant Women, Lactating Women, Scheduled Caste, Maternal Health, Financial Assistance
brief_description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste pregnant and lactating women to support maternal and child welfare.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a Scheduled Caste woman residing in Puducherry, be pregnant, apply from the sixth month of pregnancy or within three months after delivery, and have a combined annual family income not exceeding Rs.2 lakh. Benefits are limited to two deliveries.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Certificate, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Pregnancy Certificate or Medical Record, Birth Certificate of Child (for post-delivery claim), Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Obtain and submit the prescribed application form along with required documents to the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department office.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.12,000, including Rs.6,000 during pregnancy and Rs.6,000 after delivery.

scheme_name: Grant of House Construction Subsidy to Scheduled Caste People
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
target_beneficiaries: Scheduled Caste Families, Economically Backward Classes
tags: Housing, House Construction, Scheduled Caste, Subsidy, Social Welfare
brief_description: Provides housing construction subsidy to eligible Scheduled Caste and Economically Backward Class families in Puducherry.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a citizen and permanent resident of Puducherry, should not own a house, and must belong to the Scheduled Caste community or an eligible Economically Backward Class. Annual family income should not exceed prescribed limits. Scheduled Caste applicants must own a house site of at least 450 sq. ft.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Certificate, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, House Site Ownership Documents, Passport-size Photograph, Bank Account Details, Identity Proof.
application_process: Obtain the prescribed application form from the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department office, fill in the required details, attach supporting documents, and submit it to the concerned authority.
benefits: Housing subsidy of Rs.4,00,000 released in three installments and building materials worth Rs.1,00,000.

scheme_name: Distribution of Free House Sites to Scheduled Caste and Economically Backward Classes
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
target_beneficiaries: Homeless Scheduled Caste Families and Economically Backward Classes
tags: Housing, House Site, Scheduled Caste, EBC, Social Welfare
brief_description: Provides free house sites to eligible homeless Scheduled Caste and Economically Backward Class families for house construction.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a permanent resident of Puducherry, at least 18 years old, homeless, have annual family income not exceeding Rs.24,000, and no family member should own a house or house site.
documents_required: Identity Proof, Residence and Nativity Certificate, Income Certificate, Caste Certificate, Ration Card, Non-Ownership Certificate issued by Revenue Department.
application_process: Apply through the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department by obtaining and submitting the prescribed application form along with supporting documents.
benefits: Free allotment of residential house site for eligible beneficiaries.

scheme_name: Grant of Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Award for Clean Houses
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
tags: Sanitation, Cleanliness, Award, Scheduled Caste, Social Welfare
brief_description: Encourages cleanliness and hygiene among Scheduled Caste households through incentive awards.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a citizen of India, resident of Puducherry for at least three years, and belong to the Scheduled Caste community.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Certificate, Caste Certificate, Identity Proof, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form to the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department along with required documents.
benefits: Household articles worth Rs.500 awarded to selected beneficiaries.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Marriage of Poor Scheduled Caste Brides
implementing_agency: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry
tags: Marriage Assistance, Scheduled Caste, Financial Assistance, Women Welfare
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to economically disadvantaged Scheduled Caste families for the marriage of their daughters.
eligibility_criteria: Bride must belong to a Scheduled Caste family, be at least 18 years old, marriage must be legally registered, annual family income should not exceed Rs.2 lakh, and assistance is limited to two daughters per family.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Residence Certificate, Marriage Registration Certificate, Age Proof of Bride and Groom, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the Puducherry e-District Portal, upload required documents, submit the application, and track status online.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.15,000 per eligible marriage.

implementing_agency: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Bihar
tags: Old Age Pension, Senior Citizen, Social Security, Financial Assistance
brief_description: Provides monthly pension support to elderly residents of Bihar who are not receiving any other government pension.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a permanent resident of Bihar, aged 60 years or above, and should not be receiving any government pension, family pension, or social security pension.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, EPIC/Voter ID, Age Proof, Residence Proof, Passport-size Photograph, Bank Account Details for DBT.
application_process: Apply online through the Social Security Pension Management Information System (SSPMIS) portal by completing Aadhaar verification and submitting the pension application form.
benefits: Rs.400 per month for beneficiaries aged 60-79 years and Rs.500 per month for beneficiaries aged 80 years and above.

scheme_name: Scheme of Coaching & Allied Assistance for Scheduled Castes
implementing_agency: Department of Scheduled Tribe, Scheduled Caste, Minority and Backward Class Welfare, Government of Jharkhand
tags: Coaching, Competitive Exams, Scheduled Caste, Stipend, Education
brief_description: Provides free coaching and pre-examination training to Scheduled Caste candidates preparing for competitive and professional entrance examinations.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste category, be a resident of Jharkhand, possess the required educational qualifications for the target examination, and have annual family income not exceeding Rs.2.5 lakh.
documents_required: Caste Certificate, Residence Certificate, Income Certificate, Educational Qualification Certificates, Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photograph, Application Form.
application_process: Eligible candidates are selected by the department and assigned to empanelled coaching institutions. Coaching institutions apply to the department as per prescribed guidelines.
benefits: Free coaching, monthly stipend of Rs.1,000, boarding and lodging assistance of Rs.2,000 per month for outstation students, and coaching support for civil services, engineering, medical, MBA, banking and other competitive examinations.

scheme_name: Pension to Persons Who Lost 100% Eye Sight
implementing_agency: Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura
tags: Blindness, Disability, Pension, Financial Assistance
brief_description: Provides monthly pension assistance to persons with 100% visual impairment.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Tripura, aged 10 years or above, have 100% visual impairment certified by a competent medical authority, and belong to a family with annual income not exceeding Rs.1 lakh.
documents_required: Passport-size Photograph, Residence Certificate, EPIC/Voter ID, Disability Certificate, Age Proof.
application_process: Obtain the application form from the CDPO office, fill it, attach supporting documents, and submit it to the concerned CDPO office.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs.2,000.

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Vulnerable Women
implementing_agency: Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura
target_beneficiaries: Widows, Divorced, Deserted and Unmarried Women
tags: Women Welfare, Pension, Financial Assistance, Widow
category: Women and Child, Social Welfare & Empowerment
brief_description: Provides financial support to vulnerable women who require social and economic assistance.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Tripura, aged 18–59 years, belong to a family with annual income not exceeding Rs.1 lakh, and fall under categories such as widow, deserted, divorced, unmarried woman (45 years or above), or women requiring special care and protection.
documents_required: Income Certificate, Age Proof, Aadhaar Card, Permanent Resident Certificate, Ration Card, Widow/Divorce/Unmarried Certificate as applicable, Non-Government Employment Certificate.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with required documents to the concerned CDPO office.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs.2,000 directly credited to the beneficiary's bank account.

scheme_name: Samagra Samajik Suraksha Vridhavastha Pension Yojana
implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Madhya Pradesh
tags: Old Age Pension, Social Security, Elderly
brief_description: Provides pension support to destitute elderly citizens of Madhya Pradesh.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh, aged 60 years or above, and registered in the Samagra Portal.
documents_required: Photographs, Age Proof, Destitute Certificate, Samagra ID, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat, Urban Local Body, Public Service Centre, or designated government office by submitting the prescribed application form and supporting documents.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs.600.

scheme_name: Nirman Shramik Siksha Kaushal Vikas Yojana
implementing_agency: Rajasthan Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
target_beneficiaries: Children and Spouses of Registered Construction Workers
tags: Scholarship, Education, Skill Development, Construction Workers
brief_description: Provides scholarships and educational assistance to children and spouses of registered construction workers in Rajasthan.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be the child or spouse of a registered construction worker. Students must be studying in recognized schools, colleges, ITIs, polytechnics, graduation or postgraduate programs. Benefits are generally limited to two children or one child and spouse per family.
documents_required: Worker Registration Card, Aadhaar Card, Bank Passbook, Mark Sheets, Educational Institution Verification Certificate, Jan Aadhaar Details.
application_process: Apply online through Rajasthan SSO Portal and Labour Department Management System (LDMS) by selecting the scheme, filling the application form, and uploading required documents.
benefits: Scholarships ranging from Rs.8,000 to Rs.25,000 per year depending on course level, along with merit-based cash awards for high-performing students.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for the Marriage of Daughters of Poor Widows and Orphan Girls
implementing_agency: Department of Social Welfare, Government of NCT of Delhi
tags: Marriage Assistance, Widow, Orphan Girl, Financial Assistance, Women Welfare
category: Social Welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
brief_description: Provides one-time financial assistance to poor widows for the marriage of their daughters and to orphan girls or their guardians for marriage expenses.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Delhi for at least 5 years, have annual family income below Rs.1,00,000, possess an Aadhaar-linked bank account, and the bride must be at least 18 years old. Assistance is available for up to two daughters. Application must be submitted within 60 days before or after marriage.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Proof, Income Certificate, Bank Account Details, Marriage Invitation/Proof, Age Proof of Bride, Passport-size Photograph, Any other documents prescribed by the department.
application_process: Apply online through the Delhi e-District Portal by registering, logging in, selecting the scheme under the Social Welfare Department, filling the application form, uploading required documents, and submitting using OTP verification.
benefits: One-time financial assistance of Rs.30,000 per eligible daughter, limited to two daughters.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Madhya Pradesh
tags: Old Age Pension, BPL, Social Security, Financial Assistance
brief_description: Provides monthly pension support to senior citizens belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh, aged 60 years or above, and belong to a Below Poverty Line (BPL) family.
documents_required: Photographs, BPL Card, Age Proof, Samagra ID, Bank Account Details.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form with required documents through Gram Panchayat, Urban Local Body, Public Service Centre, or designated government office. Applications are verified before pension approval.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs.600.

implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance, Government of Maharashtra
tags: Disability, Shelter Home, Care and Protection, Child Welfare
brief_description: Provides shelter, care, and protection for orphaned and intellectually impaired children requiring institutional support.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an orphan child residing in Maharashtra, have intellectual disability of 40% or above, and require care and protection.
documents_required: Disability Certificate, Residence Proof, Identity Proof, Child Welfare Committee Recommendation, Medical Records.
application_process: Admission is facilitated through the Child Welfare Committee under the Juvenile Justice Act and the concerned District Social Welfare Office.
benefits: Free shelter, care, protection, rehabilitation services, and support through approved residential homes.

implementing_agency: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Manipur
tags: Disability, Travel Concession, Free Travel, Social Welfare
brief_description: Provides free travel and travel concessions to eligible persons with disabilities in Manipur.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a person with disability and a domicile resident of Manipur possessing a valid disability certificate.
documents_required: Disability Certificate, Residence Proof, Aadhaar Card, Passport-size Photograph.
application_process: Eligible applicants may apply through the Directorate of Social Welfare, which issues a passbook/card for availing travel benefits.
benefits: Free travel and concession benefits for eligible persons with disabilities.

implementing_agency: Department of Horticulture and Food Processing, Government of Assam
tags: Floriculture, Farmer, Training, Marketing, Horticulture
brief_description: Promotes commercial floriculture through cultivation support, training, marketing assistance, and protected cultivation infrastructure.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should belong to small or marginal farmer category, possess own or long-term leased land, and preference is given to women SHGs, unemployed youth, and SC/ST farmers. One beneficiary can avail one unit of 200 sq. m.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, Bank Account Details, Land Ownership/Lease Documents.
application_process: Interested beneficiaries may contact the Department of Horticulture and Food Processing or district horticulture offices for enrollment and selection through district-level committees.
benefits: Supply of planting materials, shade net support, garden tool kits, technical guidance, training, and assistance for Gerbera cultivation under protected structures.

implementing_agency: Department of Finance, Planning & Investment, Government of Arunachal Pradesh
tags: Entrepreneurship, Startup, MSME, Innovation, Incubation, Training
brief_description: Supports innovative entrepreneurs and startups in Arunachal Pradesh through incubation, mentorship, funding, and government support programs.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be 18 years or older, a resident of Arunachal Pradesh (or an Arunachali intending to return and start a business), have a business idea, prototype, or early-stage venture, and preferably be an MSME or startup established after 15 August 2015.
documents_required: Passport-size Photograph, Aadhaar Card, Domicile Certificate, Project Proposal, Proof of Concept or Revenue Generation Documents.
application_process: Register on the Arunachal Pradesh Startup Portal, create an account, complete the entrepreneurship challenge application form, upload required documents, and submit the application online.
benefits: Top 10 entrepreneurs receive grants up to Rs.5 lakh each. Next 40 entrepreneurs receive grants up to Rs.4 lakh each. Selected candidates receive incubation, mentorship, training, networking opportunities, and access to government support schemes.

implementing_agency: Chhattisgarh State Renewable Energy Development Agency (CREDA)
tags: Solar Pump, Irrigation, Renewable Energy, Farmer, Subsidy
brief_description: Provides solar irrigation pumps to farmers at subsidized rates to improve irrigation access and agricultural productivity.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident farmer of Chhattisgarh. Small, medium, and large farmers are eligible.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Land Records, Residence Proof, Bank Account Details, Passport-size Photograph, Any documents required by CREDA.
application_process: Apply through the Agriculture Department or CREDA as per district-level beneficiary selection procedures.
benefits: Subsidized installation of 3 HP and 5 HP solar irrigation pumps for agricultural use.

scheme_name: Stipend Scheme for Scheduled Tribes - Poultry Training Stipend
implementing_agency: Intensive Poultry Development Project Office / District Poultry Extension Centre
tags: Scheduled Tribe, Poultry Farming, Training, Stipend, Skill Development
brief_description: Provides poultry farming training and stipend support to Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries to promote scientific poultry farming and income generation.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to a Scheduled Tribe community in Gujarat. Preference is given to women and BPL beneficiaries.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, Residence Proof, Income Certificate, Caste Certificate, Bank Passbook, BPL Card (if applicable), Disability Certificate (if applicable).
application_process: Apply online through the I-Khedut Portal, submit supporting documents, confirm the application, and submit signed copies as required.
benefits: Training stipend up to Rs.2,000 for six-day poultry training and a poultry training completion certificate.

implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Water Storage, Irrigation, Farmer, Agriculture, Subsidy
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to farmers for constructing water storage tanks (Jal Hauj) to improve irrigation efficiency and water conservation.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident farmer of Rajasthan, possess at least 0.5 hectare cultivable land, have a water source for irrigation, and construct a tank of at least 100 cubic meter capacity.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card or Jan Aadhaar Card, Jamabandi (Land Record), Bank Account Details, Identity Proof.
application_process: Register on the Rajasthan SSO Portal, apply through the Raj Kisan Portal, complete Aadhaar authentication, upload documents, and submit the application for approval.
benefits: Subsidy of up to 60% of the project cost, subject to a maximum assistance of Rs.90,000.

implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Sprinkler Irrigation, Water Conservation, Agriculture, Subsidy
brief_description: Provides subsidy to farmers for installation of sprinkler irrigation systems to save water and improve irrigation efficiency.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a farmer residing in Rajasthan with at least 0.2 hectare of irrigated agricultural land.
documents_required: Jamabandi Copy, Aadhaar Card or Jan Aadhaar Card, Irrigation Source Certificate, Supplier Quotation.
application_process: Apply through the Rajasthan SSO and Raj Kisan Portal by registering, completing Aadhaar authentication, uploading documents, and submitting the application online.
benefits: 70% subsidy for general farmers and 75% subsidy for small, marginal, SC/ST, and women farmers. Assistance available up to 5 hectares.

scheme_name: One Time Cash Incentive for B.Ed, B.P.Ed, D.T.Ed & PGDCA (Sainik Welfare)
implementing_agency: Rajya Sainik Board, Puducherry
tags: Education, Skill Development, Ex-Serviceman, Cash Incentive, Professional Courses
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to unemployed ex-servicemen pursuing professional courses such as B.Ed, B.P.Ed, D.T.Ed, and PGDCA from recognized institutions.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an unemployed ex-serviceman registered with the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry, have obtained prior permission from the department, and apply within three years of discharge from service.
documents_required: Ex-Serviceman Identity Card, Discharge Certificate, Course Completion Certificate/Marksheet, Fee Receipt, Declaration Form.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with required documents to the Rajya Sainik Board, Puducherry within three months of successful course completion.
benefits: Reimbursement of actual course fee or up to Rs.20,000, whichever is lower.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste Students (Parixitlal Majmudar Scholarship)
implementing_agency: Directorate of Scheduled Caste Welfare, Gujarat
tags: Scholarship, Scheduled Caste, Student, Education, Pre-Matric
brief_description: Provides scholarships to Scheduled Caste students studying in Classes 1 to 10 in Gujarat.
eligibility_criteria: Student must belong to the Scheduled Caste category of Gujarat and be studying in Class 1 to 10. No income limit applies.
documents_required: Passport-size Photograph, Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate, Bank Passbook, School ID Card, Educational Records, Residence Proof.
application_process: Students should contact their school principal. Applications are submitted online through the Digital Gujarat Portal by the school.
benefits: Annual scholarship ranging from Rs.750 to Rs.1,000 depending on class and gender.

scheme_name: Sarasvati Sadhana Yojana (Free Cycles for SC Girl Students)
implementing_agency: Directorate of Scheduled Caste Welfare, Gujarat
tags: Cycle Distribution, Girl Education, Scheduled Caste, Student
brief_description: Provides free bicycles to Scheduled Caste girl students studying in Class 9 to encourage education and reduce travel difficulties.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a Scheduled Caste girl student studying in Class 9 in Gujarat. Family income should not exceed Rs.6 lakh per year.
documents_required: Passport-size Photograph, Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate, School ID Card, Educational Records.
application_process: Eligible students should contact their school principal. Applications are submitted online through the Digital Gujarat Portal.
benefits: Free bicycle provided to eligible Scheduled Caste girl students.

implementing_agency: Tamil Nadu Eyal Isai Nataka Mandram
tags: Artist Award, Culture, Music, Dance, Drama, Literature
brief_description: Prestigious state award recognizing distinguished artists for outstanding contributions to literature, music, dance, drama, cinema, folk arts, painting, sculpture, and related fields.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant should be a distinguished artist with significant contributions and long-term impact in their respective art field.
documents_required: Application Form, Achievement Records, Supporting Documents as specified by the Mandram.
application_process: Applications are invited through public notifications. Submit the prescribed application form to Tamil Nadu Eyal Isai Nataka Mandram.
benefits: Gold pendant, shawl, citation, and state recognition.

scheme_name: Grant to Meritorious Wards of Ex-Servicemen in Sports
implementing_agency: Rajya Sainik Board, Puducherry
tags: Sports Scholarship, Ex-Serviceman, Award, Student
brief_description: Provides financial rewards to children of ex-servicemen for outstanding achievements in sports at national and international levels.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a ward of a registered ex-serviceman or widow of an ex-serviceman and have achieved distinction in a recognized national or international sporting event.
documents_required: Sports Achievement Certificates, Participation Certificates, Ex-Serviceman Identity Card, Birth Certificate, Study Certificate, Bank Passbook.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form with supporting documents to the Rajya Sainik Board, Puducherry.
benefits: Rs.50,000 for international-level achievements and Rs.30,000 for national-level achievements.

implementing_agency: Agriculture Department, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Agriculture, Farmer Welfare, Food Assistance, Subsidy
brief_description: Provides nutritious meals at highly subsidized rates to farmers and their assistants visiting agricultural markets (mandis) to sell produce.
eligibility_criteria: Registered farmers bringing agricultural produce to mandi premises and licensed hamals, palladars, and weighmen are eligible.
documents_required: Valid identification proof and mandi entry pass/coupon.
application_process: Eligible beneficiaries receive food coupons at mandi entry points and can redeem them at authorized Kaleva centers within the mandi premises.
benefits: Nutritious meal available at Rs.5 per plate including chapatis, dal, vegetables, jaggery (winter), and buttermilk (summer).

implementing_agency: Department of Horticulture, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Protected Cultivation, Horticulture, Subsidy, Farmer
brief_description: Provides financial assistance for constructing shed net houses to promote cultivation of high-value horticultural crops under controlled conditions.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a Rajasthan farmer with ownership of agricultural land and access to an irrigation source.
documents_required: Aadhaar/Jan Aadhaar, Jamabandi copy, soil and water test report, irrigation proof, quotation from approved supplier, category certificate if applicable.
application_process: Apply through the Raj Kisan Portal after obtaining registration and completing Aadhaar authentication.
benefits: 50% subsidy for general farmers and 70% subsidy for small, marginal, SC, and ST farmers for up to 4,000 sq. meters.

implementing_agency: Agriculture Department, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Organic Farming, Vermicompost, Fertilizer, Subsidy
brief_description: Encourages organic farming by providing subsidies for establishing vermicompost production units.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a Rajasthan farmer cultivating horticultural crops on at least 0.4 hectares and having livestock, water, and land resources.
documents_required: Aadhaar/Jan Aadhaar, Jamabandi copy, bank passbook.
application_process: Applications are submitted through the Raj Kisan Portal followed by verification and approval by the Agriculture Department.
benefits: 50% subsidy up to Rs.50,000 for permanent vermicompost units and up to Rs.8,000 for HDPE vermibed units.

scheme_name: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Loan for Higher Studies Abroad
implementing_agency: Directorate of Scheduled Caste Welfare, Gujarat
tags: Education Loan, Overseas Education, Scheduled Caste, Higher Studies
brief_description: Provides low-interest education loans to Scheduled Caste students pursuing higher education in foreign countries.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to Gujarat Scheduled Caste category and secure admission to a recognized foreign institution. Minimum 50% marks required in qualifying examinations.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, educational certificates, passport, visa, air ticket, bank details, surety documents, residence proof.
application_process: Apply online through the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal and upload all required documents.
benefits: Education loan up to Rs.15 lakh at 4% interest rate for overseas studies.

implementing_agency: Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
tags: Labour Welfare, Tool Purchase, Loan, Construction Worker
brief_description: Provides financial assistance in the form of a loan to registered construction workers for purchasing professional tools and equipment.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a registered construction worker aged 18–60 years, have completed at least 90 days of work in a year, possess three years of board membership, and maintain regular contributions.
documents_required: Worker registration card, subscription receipts, employment certificate, salary certificate, invoice of tools purchased, property details if any.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Office of the Commissioner, Labour & Employment, Goa.
benefits: Loan assistance of up to Rs.5,000 for purchasing work tools.

scheme_name: Scheme for Small Business Owners of Scheduled Castes to Purchase Business Premises/Shop
implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat
tags: Business Development, Shop Purchase, Loan, Subsidy, Scheduled Caste
brief_description: Provides financial assistance through loans and subsidies to Scheduled Caste entrepreneurs for purchasing business premises or shops in urban areas.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a Gujarat resident belonging to the Scheduled Caste category. Preference is given to educated unemployed youth, skilled workers, self-employed individuals, and persons with technical or professional qualifications.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, residence proof, birth/school leaving certificate, bank account details, guarantor documents, passport-size photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal, complete registration, fill the application form, upload documents, and submit for verification.
benefits: Loan up to Rs.10 lakh for purchase of business premises. Beneficiary pays only 4% interest; excess bank interest is subsidized by the government for 3 years. Additional subsidy of Rs.15,000 is provided.

implementing_agency: Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
tags: Maternity, Labour Welfare, Financial Assistance, Women
category: Health & Wellness, Women and Child, Social Welfare
brief_description: Provides maternity assistance to registered construction workers for up to two pregnancies.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a registered construction worker aged 18–60 years with at least 90 days of service in a year.
documents_required: Worker registration card, subscription receipts, passbook copy, medical certificate.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with required documents to the Labour & Employment Department or Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs.2,000 per pregnancy for up to two pregnancies.

implementing_agency: Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
tags: Medical Aid, Hospitalization, Accident, Disease, Labour Welfare
brief_description: Provides financial support to construction workers hospitalized due to illness, accidents, surgery, or disability.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a registered construction worker aged 18–60 years hospitalized for at least 5 days due to accident or illness.
documents_required: Worker registration card, subscription receipts, hospitalization proof, medical certificates, disability certificate if applicable.
application_process: Submit the application with supporting medical documents to the Labour & Employment Department.
benefits: Rs.400 for the first 5 days of hospitalization and Rs.40 per day thereafter, subject to the maximum limit prescribed by the Board.

scheme_name: Supply of Television Sets to Industrial Establishments, Labour Welfare Centres, Clubs and Recreation Rooms
implementing_agency: Goa Labour Welfare Board
target_beneficiaries: Industrial Establishments, Labour Welfare Centres, Trade Union Clubs
tags: Labour Welfare, Television, Recreation, Worker Welfare
brief_description: Supports worker welfare by providing television sets to labour welfare centres, industrial establishments, and worker recreation facilities.
eligibility_criteria: Industrial establishments, labour welfare centres, or registered trade union clubs/recreation rooms with at least 300 members are eligible.
documents_required: Authorization or registration documents, TV specifications, ownership documents, undertaking for maintenance.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form through the concerned establishment to the Goa Labour Welfare Board.
benefits: One colour television set worth up to Rs.25,000 including accessories.

implementing_agency: Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
tags: Education, Scholarship, Student, Labour Welfare
brief_description: Provides educational financial assistance to children of registered construction workers.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a registered construction worker aged 18–60 years with at least 90 days of service, and the child must be pursuing education.
documents_required: Worker registration card, subscription receipts, admission proof, fee receipt, educational certificates, identity proof of student, affidavit from parent.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form with educational documents to the Labour & Employment Department.
benefits: Financial assistance for education as determined by the Goa Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.

scheme_name: Satyavadi Raja Harishchandra Marnottar Sahay Yojana
implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat
tags: Death Benefit, Funeral Assistance, Scheduled Caste, Financial Aid
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste families to meet funeral expenses after the death of a family member.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant and deceased must belong to the Scheduled Caste category and be residents of Gujarat. Application must be submitted within six months of death. Only one family member can claim the benefit.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, residence proof, death certificate, income certificate, bank account details, passport-size photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal by registering, completing the application form, uploading documents, and submitting for approval.
benefits: One-time financial assistance of Rs.5,000 towards funeral expenses.

implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat
tags: Self Employment, Tool Kit, Scheduled Caste, Livelihood
brief_description: Provides tool kits and equipment to Scheduled Caste individuals to start self-employment activities and improve livelihoods.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste category, be a resident of Gujarat, aged between 18 and 60 years, and satisfy prescribed income criteria.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, ration card, residence proof, income certificate, vocational training certificate (if any), self-declaration, passport-size photograph.
application_process: Apply through the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal by registering, selecting the scheme, uploading documents, and submitting the application online.
benefits: Free tool kits and equipment support for various self-employment trades such as tailoring, plumbing, carpentry, mobile repair, beauty parlour, welding, food processing, and other occupations.

scheme_name: Cattle Shed Subsidy Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SCSP)
implementing_agency: Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat
tags: Animal Husbandry, Cattle Shed, Subsidy, Scheduled Caste
brief_description: Provides financial assistance for construction of cattle sheds to Scheduled Caste livestock owners.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste category, be a resident of Gujarat, possess required land, and own at least two livestock animals.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, caste certificate, land ownership proof, ration card, bank account details.
application_process: Apply online through the I-Khedut Portal under Animal Husbandry Schemes and submit the required documents.
benefits: Financial assistance of up to Rs.30,000 or 50% of the construction cost, whichever is lower, for cattle shed construction.

scheme_name: Grant of Financial Assistance to Press Reporters of Puducherry
implementing_agency: Department of Information and Publicity, Government of Puducherry
tags: Journalist, Reporter, Media, Financial Assistance
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to eligible press reporters who have served in registered newspapers or magazines for a significant period.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a resident of Puducherry and have worked in a newspaper or magazine registered with the Registrar of Newspapers for India for at least 10 years.
documents_required: Nativity certificate, nationality certificate, service certificate, verification certificate, passport-size photograph.
application_process: Submit the prescribed application form along with supporting documents to the Department of Information and Publicity, Puducherry.
benefits: One-time financial assistance of Rs.25,000.

scheme_name: Fodder Minikits under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SCSP)
implementing_agency: Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat
tags: Fodder, Seeds, Livestock, Scheduled Caste
brief_description: Provides improved fodder seed minikits to Scheduled Caste farmers for livestock development and fodder cultivation.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must belong to the Scheduled Caste category, be a resident of Gujarat, and possess at least 10 guntha of agricultural land.
documents_required: Identity proof, residence proof, land ownership proof, and other documents as required.
application_process: Eligible beneficiaries may contact the nearest Intensive Cattle Development Project Sub-Centre for assistance.
benefits: Free fodder seed minikits of 3 kg, 7 kg, or 10 kg depending on eligibility and availability.

scheme_name: Free Bus Pass for Media Persons
implementing_agency: Department of Information & Publicity, Government of Puducherry
tags: Media, Journalist, Transport, Travel, Bus Pass
brief_description: Provides free annual bus passes to eligible media professionals in Puducherry for official and professional travel on PRTC buses.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be an Indian citizen, resident of Puducherry, currently employed as a full-time media professional, and have at least 3 years of service in print, electronic media, or news agencies.
documents_required: Nativity/Residence Certificate, service certificate, passport-size photographs, expired bus pass (for renewal).
application_process: Submit a formal application along with required documents to the Department of Information & Publicity, Puducherry.
benefits: Free bus pass valid for one year for travel on Puducherry Road Transport Corporation buses (excluding town buses).

implementing_agency: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of Gujarat
tags: Disability, Marriage Assistance, Divyang, Financial Aid
brief_description: Provides financial assistance to support marriages involving persons with disabilities.
eligibility_criteria: Bride must be at least 18 years old and groom at least 21 years old. Application must be submitted within two years of marriage. Disability percentage must meet prescribed criteria.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, disability certificate, marriage certificate, wedding photographs, residence proof, age proof, bank account details.
application_process: Apply online through the e-Samaj Kalyan Portal and upload required documents.
benefits: Up to Rs.1,00,000 assistance when both spouses are persons with disabilities. Financial assistance is also available when a person with disability marries a non-disabled person.

scheme_name: Rajiv Gandhi Krishak Sathi Sahayta Yojana
implementing_agency: Department of Agriculture, Government of Rajasthan
tags: Farmer, Accident Relief, Compensation, Agriculture
brief_description: Provides accident compensation and financial assistance to farmers, agricultural labourers, and market workers injured or killed during agricultural activities.
eligibility_criteria: Applicable to farmers, agricultural labourers, and licensed market workers in Rajasthan affected by accidents during agricultural or mandi-related work.
documents_required: Medical certificate, FIR, death certificate (if applicable), post-mortem report, supporting medical documents.
application_process: Apply through the Raj Kisan Portal with supporting accident-related documents.
benefits: Compensation ranging from Rs.5,000 to Rs.2,00,000 depending on the nature of injury, disability, or death.

scheme_name: Post Matric and Top Class Scholarship
implementing_agency: Higher Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh
tags: Scholarship, Higher Education, Financial Assistance, Student
brief_description: Provides financial support to economically disadvantaged students pursuing higher education.
eligibility_criteria: Students enrolled in undergraduate or postgraduate courses. Family income limits apply based on scholarship type.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card, income certificate, bank account details, mark sheets, age proof, address proof, passport-size photograph.
application_process: Apply online through the National Scholarship Portal (NSP).
benefits: Maintenance allowance, tuition fee reimbursement, and other educational support as per scholarship norms.

implementing_agency: Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCW)
tags: Construction Worker, Education Assistance, Scholarship, Student, Labour
brief_description: Provides educational financial assistance to the children of registered construction workers studying from Class 1 to higher education and professional courses.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a registered construction worker in Uttarakhand with active membership. Benefits are available for up to two children enrolled in school, higher education, or professional courses.
documents_required: Labour card, Aadhaar of worker and child, school certificate, previous year's marksheet, bank account details, self-declaration, and other supporting documents.
application_process: Apply through Shram Suvidha Kendra after registration under the Welfare Board.
benefits: Rs.1,800 per year for Classes I-V, Rs.2,400 for Classes VI-X, Rs.3,000 for Classes XI-XII, Rs.10,000 for Graduation/Post-Graduation, and fee support for ITI, Polytechnic, and professional courses.

scheme_name: Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Orthopedically Differently Abled Persons
implementing_agency: Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu
tags: Marriage Assistance, Disability, Financial Aid, Gold, Social Welfare
brief_description: Provides financial assistance and marriage support to encourage marriages involving orthopedically differently abled persons.
eligibility_criteria: One spouse must be orthopedically disabled and the other non-disabled. Both must be above 18 years of age.
documents_required: Disability ID card, marriage certificate, age proof, degree/diploma certificate (if applicable).
application_process: Apply through the District Differently Abled Welfare Office with required documents.
benefits: Rs.25,000 assistance, 8-gram gold coin for Thirumangalyam, and up to Rs.50,000 assistance if either spouse possesses a degree or diploma.

scheme_name: Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons
implementing_agency: Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu
tags: Disability, Monthly Pension, Social Security, Financial Assistance
brief_description: Provides a monthly maintenance allowance to severely disabled persons who cannot be rehabilitated through other schemes.
